scenes.narration: What does the cow say? Moo! Moo! The cow says moo!
Listen! A happy dog! Woof woof! Dogs love to bark!
Shh! A soft kitty! Meow! Cats say meow when they talk!
Splash! A duck in the water! Quack quack! Ducks love to swim!
Look at the fluffy sheep! Baa baa! Sheep have soft wool!
A little pig in the mud! Oink oink! Pigs love to play!
Cluck cluck! A chicken is laying eggs! Chickens make yummy food!
Giddy up! A fast horse! Neigh! Horses can run really fast!
Roar! The lion is the king of the jungle! Lions are so brave!
Trumpet! A big elephant with a long trunk! Elephants never forget!
Ooh ooh ah ah! A playful monkey in the trees! Monkeys love bananas!
All the animals together! Moo, woof, meow, quack! Can you make all the sounds?
